description: Source-grounded music storytelling: harvest authoritative composer portals, write cited entries, and publish dual-view (map + theme) static music diaries

schemas.description: JSON schema for a Music Diary dataset (themes + source-grounded entries)

examples.name: Music Diary
examples.description: A Chinese dual-view music diary about love across classical music, organised by emotional theme and place

skills.name: Portal Source Harvester
skills.description: Gather citable facts about musical works from authoritative composer portals and institutions, producing source-grounded candidate entries without copying portal text
triggers: find an official composer portal source

skills.name: Source-Grounded Entry Writer
skills.description: Create or revise Music Diary entries with conservative wording, citations, coordinates, collection (playlist) assignments, and listening links

skills.name: Dual-View Site Builder
skills.description: Build or adapt a no-backend static site that presents a Music Diary dataset as a Leaflet map (popups jump to a shared detail panel) plus clickable collection (playlist) lists
triggers: create a map and playlist music site
adapt Music Diary into a template
outputs: leaflet map markers with detail popups
